title: Risk Financing Redefined: The Captive Advantage
body:
Risk Financing Redefined: The Captive Advantage

Captive insurance is transforming how organizations finance risk, offering flexibility, stability, and strategic control. This webinar explains what captives are, why companies build them, and how they fit alongside other risk financing tools. Examine major structures, regulatory scrutiny, ethical challenges, and real scenarios where captives succeeded or stumbled. Explore trends reshaping the captive landscape including emerging risks, innovative reinsurance arrangements, and evolving expectations for governance. Whether evaluating a potential captive or seeking clarity around current market conversations, you’ll gain a grounded, practical understanding of this evolving sector. 

Pricing

Webinar Details

Risk Financing Redefined: The Captive Advantage

Step into the world of captive insurance and see how organizations reshape risk financing with creativity, control, and strong governance while avoiding the pitfalls that can undermine these powerful tools. 

Topics

  • Explore how captive insurance differs from self-insurance and traditional commercial coverage while clarifying where each approach delivers value.
  • Examine major captive structures and determine which models align with varied organizational goals and risk profiles.
  • Understand regulatory challenges, tax considerations, and ethical boundaries that influence captive design and operation.
  • Identify alternative risk financing tools that complement captives such as reinsurance, fronting arrangements, and emerging parametric solutions.
  • Review real examples that reveal how governance, actuarial discipline, and long-term strategy shape captive success.
